2606.30953.title: Neuro-Bayesian-Symbolic Residual Attention Shallow Network: Explainable Deep Learning for Cybersecurity Risk Assessment
2606.30953.paper_summary: We introduce the Neuro-Bayesian-Symbolic Residual Attention Shallow Network (NBS-RASN), a hybrid neural architecture for explainable cybersecurity risk assessment in open-source ecosystems. Unlike deep models that trade interpretability for accuracy, our shallow network encodes domain knowledge, causal reasoning, and expert judgment as differentiable components. It uses 80 interpretable neurons across 12 layers, including a gatekeeper that enforces five epistemological axioms - precision, causality, falsifiability, transparency, and completeness - as hard constraints before propagation. Despite limited depth, the network exhibits deep-learning traits via residual attention and feedback loops, learning complex risk patterns without becoming a black box. It produces fully decomposable scores: a deterministic weighted component plus an expert adjustment, with each adjustment traceable to named amplifiers (blast radius, propagation speed, structural nature, default exposure, exploitation pattern, institutional criticality). We validate on 20 open-source projects covering all OWASP Top 10:2025 categories and language risk classes, achieving confidence scores of 0.79-0.97, and show that explainability is guaranteed by design, not by a training algorithm. This challenges the assumption that deep learning requires deep networks, proving that shallow networks with deep reasoning can outperform opaque models in high-stakes cybersecurity, where interpretability is essential.
2606.30953.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹神經貝葉斯符號殘差注意淺層網絡（NBS-RASN），這是一種用於開源生態系統中可解釋的網絡安全風險評估的混合神經架構。與那些為了準確性而犧牲可解釋性的深度模型不同，我們的淺層網絡將領域知識、因果推理和專家判斷編碼為可微分的組件。它在12層中使用80個可解釋的神經元，包括一個執行五個認識論公理的守門人——精確性、因果性、可證偽性、透明性和完整性——作為在傳播之前的硬約束。儘管深度有限，該網絡通過殘差注意和反饋循環展現出深度學習特徵，能夠學習複雜的風險模式而不會成為黑箱。它產生完全可分解的分數：一個確定性的加權組件加上一個專家調整，每個調整都可以追溯到命名的放大器（爆炸半徑、傳播速度、結構性質、默認暴露、利用模式、機構關鍵性）。我們在涵蓋所有OWASP Top 10:2025類別和語言風險類別的20個開源項目上進行驗證，達到0.79-0.97的信心分數，並顯示可解釋性是通過設計保證的，而不是通過訓練算法。這挑戰了深度學習需要深度網絡的假設，證明了具有深度推理的淺層網絡在高風險網絡安全中可以超越不透明模型，而可解釋性是至關重要的。
2606.30953.author: Nicolaie Popescu-Bodorin et.al.
